description: Configure Mailchimp account via API: rename audience to CostSmart, update campaign_defaults from_name to CostSmart, add 5 CostSmart-specific merge fields (LEADSCORE, LEADTIER, FORMSRC, CALCNAME, PAGEURL), add missing CostSmart-Budget-Download tag, and create 4 branded HTML email templates.
steps: Step 1: Rename audience from 'B. P Miller' to 'CostSmart' via PATCH https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a with body {"name": "CostSmart", "campaign_defaults": {"from_name": "CostSmart", "from_email": "msumangali1973@gmail.com", "subject": "", "language": "en"}}

Step 2: Add merge field LEADSCORE (type: number) via POST https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a/merge-fields with {"tag": "LEADSCORE", "name": "Lead Score", "type": "number", "required": false}
Step 3: Add merge field LEADTIER (type: text) via POST with {"tag": "LEADTIER", "name": "Lead Tier", "type": "text", "required": false}
Step 4: Add merge field FORMSRC (type: text) via POST with {"tag": "FORMSRC", "name": "Form Source", "type": "text", "required": false}
Step 5: Add merge field CALCNAME (type: text) via POST with {"tag": "CALCNAME", "name": "Calculator Name", "type": "text", "required": false}
Step 6: Add merge field PAGEURL (type: text, size 255) via POST with {"tag": "PAGEURL", "name": "Page URL", "type": "text", "required": false, "options": {"size": 255}}
Step 7: Create tag CostSmart-Budget-Download via POST https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a/segments with {"name": "CostSmart-Budget-Download", "static_segment": []}

Step 8: Create HTML email template 'CostSmart Welcome' via POST https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/templates - Professional CostSmart-branded welcome email with emerald green (#059669) branding, personalized greeting using *|FNAME|*, tier-specific content mention, CTA to explore calculators

Step 9: Create HTML email template 'CostSmart Calculator Results Follow-up' via POST /templates - References the calculator they used (*|CALCNAME|*), offers tips for optimization, CTA to try other calculators

Step 10: Create HTML email template 'CostSmart Pro Upgrade Nudge' via POST /templates - Highlights Pro features (advanced analytics, PDF export, priority support), shows value proposition, CTA to /pricing page
Step 11: Create HTML email template 'CostSmart Weekly Financial Tips' via POST /templates - Digest format with 3-4 tip slots, clean design, links to blog/calculators, unsubscribe footer
Step 12: Verify all changes by querying the API to confirm: audience name is CostSmart, all 5 new merge fields exist, new tag exists, all 4 templates exist
acceptance_criteria: GET /lists/20b157c32a/merge-fields returns LEADSCORE, LEADTIER, FORMSRC, CALCNAME, PAGEURL in addition to existing fields
GET /templates?type=user returns 4 custom templates with CostSmart branding
All templates contain valid HTML with CostSmart green branding (#059669)
verification: curl -s -u 'anystring:e3b98d96bdf3a09e837d21a9388fb4e6-us6' 'https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['name']=='CostSmart'; assert d['campaign_defaults']['from_name']=='CostSmart'; print('PASS: Audience configured')"

curl -s -u 'anystring:e3b98d96bdf3a09e837d21a9388fb4e6-us6' 'https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a/merge-fields' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); tags=[f['tag'] for f in d['merge_fields']]; needed=['LEADSCORE','LEADTIER','FORMSRC','CALCNAME','PAGEURL']; assert all(t in tags for t in needed), f'Missing: {set(needed)-set(tags)}'; print('PASS: All merge fields exist')"

curl -s -u 'anystring:e3b98d96bdf3a09e837d21a9388fb4e6-us6' 'https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/lists/20b157c32a/segments' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); names=[s['name'] for s in d['segments']]; assert 'CostSmart-Budget-Download' in names; print('PASS: Budget-Download tag exists')"

curl -s -u 'anystring:e3b98d96bdf3a09e837d21a9388fb4e6-us6' 'https://us6.api.mailchimp.com/3.0/templates?type=user' | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['total_items']>=4; print(f'PASS: {d[chr(116)+chr(111)+chr(116)+chr(97)+chr(108)+chr(95)+chr(105)+chr(116)+chr(101)+chr(109)+chr(115)]} templates found')"
findings: All Mailchimp API configurations completed and verified: (1) Audience renamed from 'B. P Miller' to 'CostSmart' with campaign_defaults from_name updated to 'CostSmart'; (2) 5 merge fields added - LEADSCORE (number, id:7), LEADTIER (text, id:8), FORMSRC (text, id:9), CALCNAME (text, id:10), PAGEURL (text, id:11); (3) CostSmart-Budget-Download tag/segment created (id:1943448); (4) 4 branded HTML email templates created - CostSmart Welcome (id:10003190), CostSmart Calculator Results (id:10003191), CostSmart Pro Upgrade (id:10003192), CostSmart Weekly Tips (id:10003193). All templates use emerald green #059669 branding, responsive table-based layout, CostSmart logo styling, proper email HTML structure with DOCTYPE, and include *|FNAME|* personalization, *|UNSUB|*, *|UPDATE_PROFILE|* merge tags.
